title: Cells, Tissues, and Organs for Transplantation and Assisted Human Reproduction - Canada.ca
content:
## Cells, Tissues, and Organs for Transplantation and Assisted Human Reproduction
- Guidance on the Safety of Human Cells, Tissues and Organs for Transplantation Regulations [2025-03-12]
- Notice - DRAFT 2 nd Edition " Guidance Document for Cell, Tissue and Organ Establishments: Safety of Human Cells, Tissues and Organs for Transplantation " for consultation [2012-10-02]
- Guidance Document for Source Establishment - Reporting Adverse Reactions to Human Cells, Tissues and Organs [2010-11-01]
- Publication of the Safety of Human Cells, Tissues and Organs for Transplantation Regulations in Canada Gazette Part II [2007-06-22]
- Proposal to Publish Safety of Human Cells, Tissues and Organs for Transplantation Regulations [2005-12-12]
- Consultation Findings: Proposed New Regulatory Framework for CTO [2005-10-18]
- Up-to-date listing of all licensed medical devices, including devices licensed for donor screening
- A Coordinated and Comprehensive Donation and Transplantation Strategy for Canada [1999-11-18]
